case_title: CACH LLC VS. CHARLES G. BYERS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2014 CONTINUED TO MAY-20-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; TO FILE NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS. THE FEB-25-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYERS, CHARLES G. $5,896.27 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,171.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BYERS, CHARLES G. DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-28-2013
